case_title: PITNEY BOWES CREDIT CORPORATION, A DELAWARE CORP. VS. THE SOJOURNER TRUTH FOSTER FAMILY SERVICE AGENCY, et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT THE SOJOURNER TRUTH FOSTER FAMILY SERVICE AGENCY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AKA SOJOURNER TRUTH
BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT AMENDED, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PITNEY BOWES CREDIT CORPORATION, A DELAWARE CORP. SERVED FEB-03-2004, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT THE SOJOURNER TRUTH FOSTER FAMILY SERVICE AGENCY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AKA SOJOURNER TRUTH
DECLARATION OF LINDA BOYLES IN SUPPORT FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PITNEY BOWES CREDIT CORPORATION, A DELAWARE CORP.

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF PITNEY BOWES CREDIT CORPORATION, A DELAWARE CORP. HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE SOJOURNER TRUTH FOSTER FAMILY SERVICE AGENCY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AKA SOJOURNER TRUTH POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $10,533.38 DAMAGES, $1,400.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $323.61 COSTS, $872.78 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,129.77, JUDGMENT ALSO INCLUDES REPOSSESION OF THE PERSONAL PROPERTY DESCRIBED IN EXHIBIT A (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT).
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-18-2004, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS
